experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Worked in a collaborative team environment to translate project requirements into working software and data solutions.
Supported development, testing, and documentation of classroom analytics and security-focused software projects using Python.
Prepared technical documentation and presented design decisions, results, and improvements to academic and industry audiences.

projects.name: Classroom Behaviour Detection
bullets: Developed and tested Python-based application components to analyze classroom engagement from video datasets.
Built data preprocessing, model execution, and result visualization pipelines as part of a team-driven analytics project.
Improved model reliability on noisy and imbalanced data through structured problem-solving and experimentation.

projects.name: Buffer Overflow Vulnerability Analysis
bullets: Analyzed buffer overflow vulnerabilities in a 32-bit C environment using GDB to understand memory layouts, stack behavior, and exploit vectors.
Developed and tested exploit code to demonstrate privilege escalation, then evaluated countermeasures such as ASLR and stack protection.
Used C and GDB to diagnose and exploit buffer overflows systematically.

projects.name: Blockchain Based Login System
bullets: Developed a blockchain-based login system using Ethereum and MetaMask, implementing decentralized authentication using digital signatures.
Integrated MetaMask with Web3.js to enable cryptographic verification and a seamless user login workflow.
Designed a scalable approach to reduce risks of centralized password storage and improve user control over identity.

projects.name: Global Harvest Imports
bullets: Collaborated with teammates to understand system requirements, data relationships, and user needs.
Designed and implemented database schemas and validation logic to ensure reliable application data.
Contributed to discussions on system architecture and backend implementation.

publications.title: Design and Analysis of Cyber Security Infrastructure in Large Enterprises and Organizations
